km.Cornwall, England, United Kingdom: ខូរនវ៉ល, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Wolvedon於1440年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，他的父親Andrew Wolvedon26歲，母親Elizabeth16歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1500年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Wolvedon于1440年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，他的父亲Andrew Wolvedon26岁，母亲Elizabeth16岁。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1500年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Wolvedon was born in 1440, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Andrew Wolvedon, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 16. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1500, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Wolvedon est né en 1440, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew Wolvedon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Wolvedon 1440 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Wolvedon 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 16. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1500 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Wolvedon è nato il nel 1440 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Andrew Wolvedon, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Cornwall, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Wolvedonが1440年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Andrew Wolvedonは26歳，母Elizabethは16歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1500年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wolvedon(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Wolvedon(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 16세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1500년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Wolvedon nasceu em 1440, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew Wolvedon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1500, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Wolvedon родился в 1440 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Andrew Wolvedon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 16. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1500 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Wolvedon nació en 1440, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew Wolvedon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1500, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
